PAGE.TITLE: Claude Code
PAGE.CONTENT:
Command line (dochttps://code.claude.com/docs/en/cli-reference
enHTML)
claude update Update to latest version.
claude --resume <id or name>
claude -r <id or name> Resume a specific session by ID or name.
claude -c
claude --continue Continue most recent conversation in current directory
claude --print "query"
claude -p "query" Print response without interactive mode.
claude --name <name>
claude -n <name> Set a display name for the session.
claude --dangerously-skip-permissions
claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions Skip permission prompts.
Commands (dochttps://code.claude.com/docs/en/commands
enHTML)
/exit
/quit Exit the CLI.
/help Show help and available commands.
/usage
/stats
/cost Show session cost, plan usage limits, and activity stats.
/model Set the AI model.
/effort Set effort level for model usage.
/clear Start a new session with empty context; previous session stays on disk (resumable with /resume)
/skills List available skills.
/memory Open a memory file in your editor
/btw Ask a quick side question without interrupting the main conversation.
/release-notes View release notes.
/loop [interval] [prompt] Skill.
Run a prompt repeatedly while the session stays open.
Omit the interval and Claude self-paces between iterations.
Omit the prompt and Claude runs an autonomous maintenance check, or the prompt in .claude/loop.md if present.
